instance.description: The name of the Cloud SQL instance.

type.description: The user type. It determines the method to authenticate the user during login. The default is the database's built-in user type.

password.description: The password for the user. Can be updated. For Postgres instances this is a Required field, unless type is set to either CLOUD_IAM_USER or CLOUD_IAM_SERVICE_ACCOUNT. Don't set this field for CLOUD_IAM_USER and CLOUD_IAM_SERVICE_ACCOUNT user types for any Cloud SQL instance

host.description: The host the user can connect from. This is only supported for MySQL instances. Don't set this field for PostgreSQL instances. Can be an IP address.

password_policy.type: list(object({allowed_failed_attempts: optional(number), password_expiration_duration: optional(number), enable_failed_attempts_check: optional(bool), enable_password_verification: optional(bool)}))
password_policy.description: A policy block for the passwords
